title: Zwad's Simple Bingo
description:
A simple pack featuring essential server optimization mods, along with Chunky for efficient chunk pregeneration.

Newer versions include Yet Another Bingo Mod as the pack was always made for running Bingo Games.
body:
The pack includes several essential optimization mods, along with [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) for chunk pregeneration.

My primary use case for this modpack is when setting up a server for LAN events. [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) is particularly crucial; without pregenerating chunks, allowing all players to join at once could lead to server crashes due to Minecraft's highly resource-intensive chunk generation process.

I host the modpack using the [itzg docker image](https://docker-minecraft-server.readthedocs.io/en/latest/) on a local server, but feel free to host it however suits you best.

Here's an example using Docker Compose:
```yaml
version: "3.8"

services:
  mc:
    image: itzg/minecraft-server
    tty: true
    stdin_open: true
    ports:
      - "25565:25565"
    environment:
      EULA: "TRUE"
      MOD_PLATFORM: MODRINTH
      MODRINTH_MODPACK: LINK_TO_YOUR_MODPACK
    volumes:
      # attach the relative directory 'data' to the container's /data path
      - ./data:/data
```

Please feel free to use this pack, but note that I cannot guarantee any continued support beyond any updates I make in preparation for upcoming LAN events.
